subject: Bootstrap: triage-nda for subagentknowledge.com TOS
body: Review cowork/apps/legal/tos-draft.md if it exists, or create a placeholder NDA triage entry for the subagentknowledge.com product. Output: legal/nda-triage-2026-06-19.jsonl with status=triaged and risk=low|medium|high.

subject: DECISION: draft-tos-now — draft subagentknowledge.com Terms of Service

payload.rationale: Cannot ship without TOS. Draft first, counsel reviews draft (not blank page). Fastest path to shippable product.
scope: Acceptable use policy for multi-agent platform
Data handling and privacy (reference existing privacy posture)
Subscription and billing terms (placeholder until pricing is set)
payload.notes: Flag any section needing counsel sign-off before we publish. Queued for operator review before any external use.
